content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.29%, Bank Nifty -1.28%, PSU Banks -2.04% — broad weakness with energy/metals as outliers on crude spike. With 50 mins to close and book already 45% deployed with mixed P&L, focus is position management not new entries. Performance track record (14% win rate, profit factor 0.4x) demands discipline.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23960,
      "nifty_resistance": 24180
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD with current SL 1028 already locks in ~4.5% gain (above breakeven). No change needed — SL already at trail level given the +6% move. Emitting HOLD via position_actions instead of duplicate MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 1.7% but SL at 119 (-3.2% from entry) intact. Gold supported by geopolitical hedge thesis (Iran/Hormuz) though near-term momentum weak. Hold for hedge value."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +1.9% with SL already at 1425 (above entry 1412.94 — breakeven+). Stock at all-time high 1441 with 22% rally in 1M, blowoff risk. Keep tight SL at 1425 to protect gains. No-op MODIFY — handled in position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry 404.50 (breakeven). Position +0.6%. Q4 results May 15 binary risk. Keep breakeven SL — no-op handled in position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1735 already at breakeven+. Organon deal raises leverage to 2.3x net debt/EBITDA — research turned NEUTRAL. MACD bearish crossover on daily. Tight SL above entry is correct posture. No-op handled in position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Slightly underwater at -0.4%. SL at 315 (~1.7% below entry) is tight. Strong sector backdrop (record peak demand 256 GW), Q4 results May 19. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 1.0% intraday after gapping up. Q4 print today was positive (+11% PAT, dividend 5.25). SL at 463 (~1.3% below entry) is tight. Hold through near-term volatility."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1028 locks in +4.5% gain. No change needed. Stock pulled back from 1055 today on housing finance sector weakness — let SL do its job."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Geopolitical hedge thesis intact. Maintain SL 119 (3.2% loss tolerance). Do not tighten — gold needs room given short-term consolidation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already 1425 (above 1412.94 entry). At ATH with stretched valuation. Tight SL is correct."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven. Q4 May 15 is binary — protect entry. Trail to 408 only if stock breaks above 414 decisively."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1735 (breakeven+). Organon leverage concerns + bearish MACD on daily warrant tight stop. Earnings May 19."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 315.00,
      "reasoning": "Position marginally underwater. SL 315 acceptable (~1.7%). Strong transmission capex thesis, Q4 May 19 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 463.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results positive (PAT +11%, dividend 5.25). Intraday weakness after morning gap. SL at 463 protects 1.3%. Give thesis a few days."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ONGC: Strong +4.6% breakout to new 52w high on crude spike — but already extended intraday (CMP 299 vs intraday low 286). Wait for pullback to 290-292 zone. TATACHEM (+11.4%) and RKFORGE (+8.2%) are vertical moves on a weak market day — chasing now is poor R/R. AARTIIND breakout to 52w high looks cleaner but I already have energy/power cluster heavy; chemicals would add a different theme. RRKABEL/JSWENERGY/RELIANCE all sit in clusters I'm already exposed to (power/energy). RELIANCE actually NEUTRAL-BEARISH research (Q4 PAT -12.5%) — skip.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 45% deployed across 7 names with 3 OPEN orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) still working — adding TATAPOWER would create power-cluster overconcentration with existing NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA. With market cautious, performance weak (14% win rate, PF 0.4x), and only 50min to close, the right move is NO new entries. The 3 OPEN orders represent enough additional exposure if they fill. Cluster risk: NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA + (potential TATAPOWER fill) = ~25-30% in power/coal complex; that's near my soft cap. Will reassess pending TATAPOWER order tomorrow — may cancel if power names start to roll over. Today's bias: protect what I have, don't chase vertical moves on a weak-breadth day."
}
